title: Cardia
description: Once upon a time, a young adventurer saved a powerful elf trapped in the swamp. Together they built the magical city of Cardia. Today, the city thrives. However, four factions struggle for power: the Swamp Rebels, the Academy Scholars, the Guild Mechanics, and the Dynasty Heirs. Whoever wins the powerful signets and gains the favor of the factions will become the next ruler of Cardia. Play your cards well and outsmart your opponent!

noValidTarget.noMarkers: No cards on the field have modifier tokens or ongoing markers

mercenary_swordsman.name: Mercenary Swordsman
mercenary_swordsman.description: Discard this card and the opposing card

void_mage.name: Void Mage
void_mage.description: Remove all modifier tokens and ongoing markers from any card

surgeon.name: Surgeon
surgeon.description: Add -5 influence to your next played card

saboteur.name: Saboteur
saboteur.description: Your opponent discards the top 2 cards of their deck

diviner.name: Diviner
diviner.description: In the next encounter, your opponent must reveal their card face-up before you

court_guard.name: Court Guard
court_guard.description: Choose a faction. Your opponent may discard a card of that faction from their hand, otherwise this card gains +7 influence

judge.name: Judge
judge.description: 🔄 You win all ties, including future encounters. Ties do not trigger abilities

ambusher.name: Ambusher
ambusher.description: Choose a faction. Your opponent discards all cards of that faction from their hand

puppeteer.name: Puppeteer
puppeteer.description: Discard the opposing card and replace it with a random card from your opponent's hand. The opponent's ability is not triggered

clockmaker.name: Clockmaker
clockmaker.description: Add +3 influence to your previous encounter card and your next played card

treasurer.name: Treasurer
treasurer.description: 🔄 Winner of previous encounter gains extra signet

swamp_guard.name: Swamp Guard
swamp_guard.description: Return one of your previously played cards to your hand and discard its opposing card

governess.name: Governess
governess.description: Copy and activate the instant ability of one of your played cards with influence not less than this card

inventor.name: Inventor
inventor.description: Add +3 influence to any card and add -3 influence to another card

poisoner.name: Poisoner
poisoner.description: Reduce the opposing card's influence until the current encounter is a tie

telekinetic_mage.name: Telekinetic Mage
telekinetic_mage.description: Move all modifier tokens and ongoing markers from one of your cards to another of your cards

messenger.name: Messenger
messenger.description: Add -3 influence to any card or your next played card

revolutionary.name: Revolutionary
revolutionary.description: Your opponent discards 2 cards from their hand, then draws 2 cards

librarian.name: Librarian
librarian.description: After you play and reveal your next card, add +2 or -2 influence to that card

genius.name: Genius
genius.description: Add +3 influence to one of your cards with influence no greater than 8

noble.name: Noble
noble.description: If this card wins the encounter, gain an additional signet

extortionist.name: Extortionist
extortionist.description: Choose a faction. If your opponent's next card is not of that faction, they discard 2 cards after revealing it

illusionist.name: Illusionist
illusionist.description: Activate the ability of one of your cards that lost

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.description: After the ability phase of the next encounter, add +5 influence to your played card

advisor.name: Advisor
advisor.description: 🔄 In the previous encounter, your card won and your opponent's card lost

witch_king.name: Witch King
witch_king.description: Choose a faction. Your opponent discards all cards of that faction from their hand and deck, then shuffles their deck

elementalist.name: Elementalist
elementalist.description: Discard a card with an instant ability from your hand, copy and activate that ability, then draw a card

mechanical_spirit.name: Mechanical Spirit
mechanical_spirit.description: 🔄 If you win the next encounter, you win the game

heir.name: Heir
heir.description: Your opponent keeps 2 cards and discards all other cards from their hand and deck

deck_i_card_01.description: Influence 1 | Swamp | ⚡ Discard this card and the opposing card

deck_i_card_12.name: Treasurer
deck_i_card_12.description: Influence 12 | Dynasty | 🔄 Winner of previous encounter gains extra signet

deck_i_card_13.name: Swamp Guard
deck_i_card_13.description: Influence 13 | Swamp | ⚡ Return your card to hand, discard opposing

deck_i_card_14.name: Governess

deck_i_card_16.name: Elf
deck_i_card_16.description: Influence 16 | Dynasty | ⚡ You win the game

deck_ii_card_01.name: Poisoner
deck_ii_card_01.description: Influence 1 | Swamp | ⚡ Reduce opposing card to force tie

deck_ii_card_02.name: Telekinetic Mage
deck_ii_card_02.description: Influence 2 | Academy | ⚡ Move all tokens from one card to another

deck_ii_card_03.name: Messenger
deck_ii_card_03.description: Influence 3 | Guild | ⚡ -3 to any card or next card

deck_ii_card_05.name: Revolutionary
deck_ii_card_05.description: Influence 5 | Swamp | ⚡ Opponent discards 2, then draws 2

deck_ii_card_06.name: Librarian
deck_ii_card_06.description: Influence 6 | Academy | ⚡ +2 or -2 to next card after reveal

deck_ii_card_07.name: Genius
deck_ii_card_07.description: Influence 7 | Guild | ⚡ +3 to your card with influence ≤8

deck_ii_card_08.name: Noble
deck_ii_card_08.description: Influence 8 | Dynasty | ⚡ If wins, gain extra signet

deck_ii_card_09.name: Extortionist
deck_ii_card_09.description: Influence 9 | Swamp | ⚡ Choose faction: if next not that, discard 2

deck_ii_card_10.name: Illusionist
deck_ii_card_10.description: Influence 10 | Academy | ⚡ Activate ability of your lost card

deck_ii_card_11.name: Engineer
deck_ii_card_11.description: Influence 11 | Guild | ⚡ +5 to next card after ability phase

deck_ii_card_12.name: Advisor
deck_ii_card_12.description: Influence 12 | Dynasty | 🔄 Previous: you won, opponent lost

deck_ii_card_13.name: Witch King
deck_ii_card_13.description: Influence 13 | Swamp | ⚡ Choose faction: discard all from hand/deck, shuffle

deck_ii_card_14.name: Elementalist
deck_ii_card_14.description: Influence 14 | Academy | ⚡ Discard instant, copy ability, draw 1

deck_ii_card_15.name: Mechanical Spirit
deck_ii_card_15.description: Influence 15 | Guild | 🔄 Win next = win game

deck_ii_card_16.name: Heir
deck_ii_card_16.description: Influence 16 | Dynasty | ⚡ Opponent keeps 2, discards rest

misty_swamp.name: Misty Swamp
misty_swamp.description: In the first turn, don't reveal cards. You may peek at your face-down card anytime. 'Next card you play' refers to the next card you choose from hand.

great_library.name: Great Library
great_library.description: If your deck has only 1 card left, draw it normally. If deck is empty, don't draw.

haunted_catacombs.name: Haunted Catacombs
haunted_catacombs.description: This effect only triggers when you reveal a card in phase 1. Whether the card can be discarded doesn't matter. If abilities cause same-faction cards to be adjacent, you don't lose.

giant_serpent.name: Giant Serpent
giant_serpent.description: Even if you lose that encounter again later in the game, it doesn't matter.

auction_house.name: Auction House
auction_house.description: This effect triggers after you reveal a card in phase 1. All markers on the card count toward influence. If your current card's influence equals the previous card, don't discard. This effect only applies to your own played cards. If your deck is empty, ignore this effect.

sword_starter_camp.name: Sword Starter Camp
sword_starter_camp.description: You need to win 3 consecutive encounters. This victory condition can trigger at any phase. If a card has multiple signets, it still only counts as winning 1 encounter.

garbage_dump.name: Garbage Dump
garbage_dump.description: If your deck has 0 or 1 cards left, ignore this effect. If your deck has 2 cards, draw both and put 1 back.

market.name: Market
market.description: Only in the end phase you don't draw cards. If an ability lets you draw, draw normally. If you're in phase 0 or 1, draw immediately.

steps.welcome:
Welcome to Cardia!

This is a strategic card game. Your goal is to win encounters and earn 5 signets. The first player to reach this goal wins.
steps.handIntro:
This is your hand area.

At the start of each turn, you'll draw new cards. Each card has unique abilities.
steps.battlefieldIntro:
This is the battlefield.

Cards played by both players will face off here. Each card has an influence value, and the side with higher influence wins the encounter.
steps.signetIntro:
This is the signet counter.

Each time you win an encounter, you earn 1 signet. The first player to earn 5 signets wins!
steps.phaseIntro:
This is the phase indicator.

Each turn has three phases:
1. Play Phase - Play one card
2. Ability Phase - Activate card abilities
3. End Phase - End your turn
steps.playPhaseExplain:
It's now the Play Phase.

You must play one card to the battlefield each turn. Let's play the Apprentice card.
steps.playFirstCard: Click the Apprentice card to play it to the battlefield.
steps.abilityPhaseExplain:
It's now the Ability Phase.

If you're the loser of this turn (or tied), you can activate abilities of cards on the battlefield. The Apprentice's ability is to draw 1 card.
steps.activateAbility: Click the Apprentice card on the battlefield to activate its ability.
steps.endTurnExplain:
It's now the End Phase.

Click the End Turn button to end your turn.
steps.opponentTurn:
It's now your opponent's turn.

Your opponent will play a card and then end their turn.
steps.encounterExplain:
Both players have played cards!

Now the encounter will be resolved. The side with higher influence will earn 1 signet.
steps.influenceExplain:
Influence calculation rules:

• Base influence = card's influence value
• Modifier tokens can increase or decrease influence
• Ongoing effects also affect influence

The side with higher influence wins the encounter!
steps.summary:
Tutorial Summary:

• Play one card each turn
• The loser can activate abilities
• Win encounters to earn signets
• First to 5 signets wins

You've now mastered the basic rules. Begin your adventure!
steps.finish:
Tutorial Complete!

Enjoy your time in the world of Cardia!
